name: Baked Goat's Cheese Log with Prawns & Basil
recipeIngredient: 1 oz Prawns, chopped and divided into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the garlic and basil with a pinch of salt.
2. Pound the pine nuts in a pestle and mortar; add the oil, basil and garlic mixture.
3. Stir in the Parmesan and prawns.
4. Cut each sheet of fillo in half and place a cube of goat's cheese in the center.
5. Spoon over the basil mixture.
6. Brush the edges of the pastry with melted butter and wrap up to form a parcel.
7. Place on a baking sheet, brush with butter.
8. Bake at 200°C (400°F) mark 6 for about 20 minutes.
9. Serve warm with salad leaves.
